privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a work package titled 'Implement user account dashboard with order history' in the 'E-Commerce Platform' project (identifier: ecommerce-platform). It must be of type 'Task', with status 'In Progress', and assigned to 'Alice Johnson' (login: alice.johnson). These string values and properties are verified by the task description and the OpenProject environment initialization script (setup_openproject.sh) which deterministically seeds this exact project and user data.
